publishedAbstract: - Unable to provision with `thin-csi` storage class. ``` Dynamic storage class provisioning failing with "failed to provision volume with StorageClass "thin-csi": rpc error: code = Internal desc = failed to create volume. Error: ServerFaultCode: createSpecs.datastores is empty" ```
publishedTitle: failed to create volume. Error: ServerFaultCode: createSpecs.datastores is empty
